steps.title: Check negative inputs
steps.content: If $x<0$, then $\frac{1}{3}x-2<-2$. The inequality requires $y$ to be less than that negative number, so no point with $x<0$ and $y>0$ can satisfy it.

steps.title: Match the impossible region
steps.content: The region with negative $x$-values and positive $y$-values contains no solution points. The answer is A.
